summary: Frontend E2E testing of Delivery Reporting & Collection (Reports → Delivery tab). All 9 requested scenarios passed: commission rates 15%/18% shown (no 0%), drill-down dialogs (orders list + invoice details with items/subtotal/commission/net), offers toggle auto-calculates 975 IQD / 4.9% from actual 19000 vs expected 19975, success toast appears, and Owner Wallet deposit row created in MongoDB with source='delivery_collection', amount=19000, created_by='احمد المحصل'.
critical_code_review_comments: Reports.js is ~4378 lines — recommend splitting tab components (DeliveryReportTab, CashClosureTab, etc.) into separate files for maintainability.

Several 403 errors in console for /api/users, /api/branches, /api/reports/sales when admin loads /reports — non-blocking for delivery flow but indicates permission middleware mismatch; main agent should audit role permissions.
Adding data-testid attributes for the report tabs would simplify automation (currently rely on Arabic inner text matching).
seed_data_creation: Pre-existing seed (delivery_app_settings: توترز 15%, طلبات 18%; orders #1001/#1002/#1003) was already present and current-day dated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login flow note: shadcn email/password inputs need keyboard.type() (not page.fill) to trigger React onChange handlers; press Enter to submit. Reports tabs are identified by exact Arabic inner-text match on [role='tab'] — there are 14 tabs total. Delivery tab data-testids confirmed working: view-orders-{appName}, collect-delivery-{appName}, delivery-orders-list, delivery-order-{orderNumber}, invoice-details, close-invoice-details, has-offers-switch, actual-collected-input, offer-amount-value, offer-percentage-value, collected-by-input.
